title: デビュー戦の後に・仕掛ける

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky successfully makes her debut, but
compared to her glamorous peers, she's not
gathering much attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she smiles as if that's exactly what she
had planned. We decide to hide in the shadows,
choosing races she's likely to win as we build up
her skills for her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, she receives a call from her
grandfather who congratulates her on the debut.
Her expression as she talks with him is unusually
soft.
